news.headline: Fed's Goolsbee: If tariffs raise prices, the Fed has to think about it.

Research report on UAE Buy Now Pay Later market projects growth by 15.6% annually, reaching $2.84 billion in 2025 with key players Tabby, Tamara, Spotii, Postpay, Cashew, Klarna, Alif - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A recent report on UAE Buy Now Pay Later Business and Investment Opportunities reveals key insights on the market size, end-use sectors, market share, product analysis, business model, and demographics. The BNPL payment market in the United Arab Emirates is projected to see a 15.6% annual growth, reaching a value of US$2.84 billion by 2025. Between 2021 and 2024, the UAE's BNPL market demonstrated strong expansion, achieving noteworthy progress.

news.headline: Southern Company's Q4 revenue grew 4.9% to $6.34 billion, surpassing consensus of $5.88 billion. Operating revenues by segment included Alabama Power $1.751B (+7.4% Y/Y), Georgia Power $2.586B (+11.8% Y/Y), Mississippi Power $345M (+2.4% Y/Y), Southern Power $417M (-17.1% Y/Y), and Southern Company Gas $1.236B (-3.8% Y/Y). Kilowatt-Hour Sales rose by 2.7%, with Retail sales up 2.8% and Wholesale sales up 2.5% Y/Y.
news.summary: Southern Company's (NYSE:SO) shares experienced a decrease after the company announced a 4.9% year-over-year increase in fourth-quarter operating revenue to $6.34 billion, surpassing the expected $5.88 billion. Operating revenues per segment showed growth: Alabama Power at $1.751 billion (+7.4% Y/Y), Georgia Power at $2.586 billion (+11.8% Y/Y), Mississippi Power at $345 million (+2.4% Y/Y), Southern Power at $417 million (-17.1% Y/Y), and Southern Company Gas at $1.236 billion (-3.8% Y/Y). Kilowatt-Hour Sales increased by 2.7%, with Retail sales up by 2.8% and Wholesale sales up by 2.5% Y/Y. The rise in kilowatt-Hour retail sales had a significant impact on the overall performance.

news.headline: US' Witkoff is expected to speak by phone on Thursday with Qatari Prime Minister Mohammed bin Abdul Rahman al-Thani about the second phase of the deal - AXIOS Reporter on X.
Fed's Goolsbee: Before new uncertainties, the path to 2% looked good.

Insurity survey shows consumer confidence in AI for P&C insurance decreasing. Insurers urged to take action.
news.summary: Insurity, a prominent provider of cloud-based solutions for the insurance industry, unveiled new insights from its 2025 AI in Insurance Report. The report indicates a notable change in consumer perception of artificial intelligence (AI) in property and casualty (P&C) insurance compared to the previous year. According to the findings, trust in AI has decreased significantly across various aspects, underscoring the urgency for insurers to adapt. This highlights the importance of staying informed about evolving consumer sentiments on AI in insurance.

news.headline: SharpHeels hosts 'Making an Impact Summit' in Austin, Texas to empower women in leadership on International Women's Day.
news.summary: Austin, Texas - SharpHeels recently organized the 'Making an Impact Summit' to celebrate International Women’s Day and empower women in leadership roles. This event aimed to provide valuable insights and inspiration to female professionals looking to make a difference in their careers. The summit featured prominent speakers and workshops focusing on various aspects of leadership development and career advancement. Attendees were able to network and learn from successful women in business. The event drew a large audience, with over 500 participants joining in to gain knowledge and support for their professional growth.

news.headline: Costamare Inc. released its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the year ended Dec 31, 2024, accessible on its website.
news.summary: Today, Costamare Inc. disclosed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This report, now available for viewing on the company's website, www.costamare.com, in the "Investors" section under "Annual Reports," offers insights into their financial performance and strategies. Costamare Inc., identified under the ticker NYSE: CMRE, invites stakeholders to delve into the specifics outlined in the report for a comprehensive understanding of its operations.

news.headline: Walmart profits below estimate for the full year.
Fed's Goolsbee: PCE is not likely to be as sobering as CPI number.
Elon Musk is fixated on DOGE with no clear strategy to boost Tesla sales amid a downturn.
news.summary: Elon Musk, a key adviser to President Trump, has yet to detail a strategy to address declining sales at the electric car company where he serves as CEO.

news.headline: A.I. tools, incl. Microsoft, are revolutionizing coding, shaping the future of tech careers.  Engineers lead workforce evolution.
news.summary: Artificial intelligence tools developed by Microsoft and various other tech companies are now being utilized to assist in writing code, underscoring the significant role of software engineers in harnessing the transformative power of this technology.

news.headline: A.I. is revolutionizing Silicon Valley start-ups, reducing the need for massive funds and workers, leading to success with small teams.
news.summary: In the past, technology start-ups used to secure significant amounts of funding in order to expand their workforce and scale rapidly. However, with the advent of artificial intelligence technologies, companies are now able to increase the productivity of their employees, leading to success stories of achieving significant growth with small teams. This shift in approach highlights a notable trend towards utilizing AI tools to boost efficiency and competitiveness in the industry.

news.headline: FBS analysts discuss AI's impact on trading, highlighting a 45% increase in accuracy with AI-powered assistants.
news.summary: In Singapore on February 20, 2025, FBS, a top global broker, published an in-depth analysis on artificial intelligence's impact on trading. The report illustrates AI's increasing importance in enhancing efficiency, precision, and data-based decision-making. A key development highlighted by FBS analysts is the emergence of AI-driven trading assistants. These assistants analyze large quantities of live market data to detect trends and patterns that traders may miss. Utilizing AI insights, traders can refine strategies and enhance market timing. Results from a 2024 market report indicate that traders using AI-powered assistants boosted their entry and exit point accuracy by 45% in highly volatile markets. AI systems also facilitate real-time sentiment analysis by scanning financial news and social media for assessing market dynamics. A global 2024 survey by TradingTech Insights revealed that 75% of retail traders saw... (Continued on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: Versus Systems renews partnership with Texas Rangers for 2025 season, fourth year running.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Versus Systems Inc. revealed the extension of its collaboration with the Texas Rangers for the 2025 Major League Baseball season. This marks the fourth straight year of partnership between the two entities. Through this deal, the Texas Rangers will continue utilizing Versus' Filter Fan Cam technology to boost fan interaction during significant team events. The partnership has displayed success in enhancing fan engagement over the years. Versus Systems Inc. operates on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol VS.

news.headline: Exclusive: Biggest shareholder reveals plans to increase stake in company, aiming to own 30% of shares.
Breezeline is bringing advanced fiber internet to Cumberland, Maryland with FTTH technology for high speeds.
news.summary: Breezeline is set to implement fiber-to-the-home (FTTH) technology, offering stellar speeds to its customers. This move will greatly enhance connectivity for users, offering blazing fast internet speeds. This deployment will cover a significant number of households and businesses, providing them with top-notch internet services. This technology upgrade is expected to significantly increase internet speeds, making it a game-changer for users in terms of efficiency and reliability.

news.headline: Breezeline brings fiber internet to 9 NH communities, boosting speed & performance for more residents.
news.summary: We are increasing the number of fiber connections to additional households and commercial establishments to enhance internet speed and performance. This expansion aims to provide high-quality connectivity to a larger number of homes and businesses. The project involves connecting X amount of new locations to our fiber network, ensuring faster and more reliable internet access for residents and organizations in the area. The goal is to improve online experiences for approximately Y number of customers by offering superior speed and performance through fiber-optic technology.

news.headline: Investors question if Apple stock is worth buying post iPhone 16e launch.
news.summary: Following the launch of Apple's latest budget-friendly iPhone, investors are questioning whether Apple stock is a worthwhile investment at this moment. The unveiling of the iPhone 16e has sparked interest in the potential profitability of Apple.

news.headline: Africa Data Center Construction Market valued at USD 1.26B in 2024, projected to reach USD 3.06B by 2030 with a CAGR of 15.94%.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the Africa Data Center Construction Market reveals promising growth projections. The market was valued at USD 1.26 billion in 2024 and is expected to reach USD 3.06 billion by 2030, indicating a substantial CAGR of 15.94%. Key highlights from the report include African governments actively promoting data center expansion through measures like tax incentives, Special Economic Zones (SEZs), and other supportive policies.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls due to surprise jobless claims, Carvana and Walmart plunge on earnings report.
news.summary: On Thursday, the Dow Jones experienced a decline due to an increase in weekly jobless claims, surpassing expectations. This led to drops in the stock prices of Carvana and Walmart following their earnings reports. Carvana and Walmart specifically plunged significantly, affecting the overall market sentiment. The unexpected rise in jobless claims and the subsequent impact on major companies caused a downturn in the Dow Jones, highlighting the uncertainty in the current economic environment.

news.headline: Unity Software's Q4 revenue: down 25% to $457.1M, beats estimates. Stock drops on weak guidance & game revenue decline.
news.summary: Shares of Unity Software Inc (NYSE:U) plunged following the release of its fourth-quarter financial report. The company's revenue for the quarter saw a 25% decline year-over-year, totaling $457.1 million, surpassing the projected $433.17 million. Additionally, they reported a loss of 30 cents per share, outperforming analyst expectations. Unity Software is known for its 3D development platform used for creating various games and applications.

news.headline: CenterPoint Energy (NYSE: CNP) reports 25% increase in EPS at 40 cents, plans $5.75 billion grid upgrade for resilience.
news.summary: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (CNP) saw a drop in shares on Thursday as they announced an adjusted EPS of 40 cents, aligning with the consensus. The adjusted EPS marked a 25% increase from the previous year, attributed to growth, regulatory recovery, and reduced O&M costs, each contributing 5 cents per share. Additionally, 2 cents per share came from weather conditions and usage patterns. President & CEO, Jason Wells, emphasized the progress made through the GHRI initiative in developing a highly resilient coastal grid. The company has recently filed for a $5.75 billion project.

news.headline: IQVIA releases 2024 Sustainability Report showcasing achievements in accelerating innovation for a healthier world.
news.summary: IQVIA, a prominent global provider of clinical research services and healthcare intelligence, has recently released its 2024 Sustainability Report. Published in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina, the report highlights IQVIA's sustainability accomplishments aligned with its goal of advancing innovation for a healthier world. The company, listed on the NYSE as IQV, is known for delivering commercial insights to the life sciences and healthcare sectors. Through a combination of technological advancements, scientific knowledge, and its distinct healthcare information resources, IQVIA aims to drive progress towards a more sustainable future.

news.headline: SiMa.ai and HTEC extend partnership to enhance MLSoC solutions with AI tools after 5-year collaboration.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, HTEC, a worldwide digital engineering services company, has announced an extension of their partnership with SiMa.ai, a software-focused embedded edge machine learning system-on-chip (MLSoC) business. Over the past five years, the collaboration between SiMa.ai and HTEC has led to the development of an ML compiler, system drivers, and various sophisticated AI-powered software solutions to enhance SiMa.ai's edge AI platform. SiMa.ai has utilized HTEC's expertise in AI and ML-driven engineering as well as chip optimization throughout this successful partnership.

news.headline: China and Russia's foreign ministers meet during G20 meeting.
China's Foreign Minister Wang Yi: China and Russia are to deepen strategic coordination.
Newmont Corp (NYSE:NEM) to report Q4 earnings of $1.04/share, revenue $5.3 billion; stock offers 2.11% annual dividend yield.
news.summary: Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) is set to report its fourth-quarter financial results on Thursday, Feb. 20, with analysts projecting earnings of $1.04 per share, a significant increase from 50 cents per share a year ago. The company is anticipated to announce quarterly revenue of $5.3 billion, up from $3.96 billion in the previous year. During January, Newmont completed the sale of its Porcupine mine in Ontario for $425 million to Discovery Silver (OTC:DSVSF), marking a step in its strategy to divest from non-core assets. With Newmont's recent performance drawing attention, investors are also considering potential gains from the company's dividends, with an annual dividend yield of 2.11%. This information and more can be found on Benzinga Pro.

news.headline: Nacha reveals 2025 Board of Directors, emphasizing industry leadership and commitment to payments system evolution.
news.summary: Nacha, based in Reston, Va., has disclosed its Board of Directors for 2025, comprising seasoned executives representing various sectors within the payments industry. The Board offers essential strategic counsel for managing Nacha as an industry association and steering the ongoing development of the contemporary ACH Network. Their responsibilities include supervising Nacha's strategic trajectory and upholding the ACH Network as a fundamental component of the U.S. payment infrastructure. Joe W. Hussey holds the position of Managing Director on the Board.

Malaysia to add 150MW of power capacity by 2025 with detailed analysis of 41 existing and 48 upcoming data centers.
news.summary: A new database titled "Malaysia Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This database focuses on analyzing the Malaysia data center market portfolio, offering insights into both existing and upcoming colocation data centers. The database includes detailed analyses of 41 existing data centers and 48 upcoming data centers, encompassing various locations such as Johor, Kedah, Kuala Lumpur, Penang, Perak, Sarawak, and Selangor. Key information provided includes the existing white-floor space available in these data centers.

news.headline: The GaN Power Device Market expected to reach $12,849.3 million by 2033, growing at a 45.6% CAGR from 2024.
news.summary: A report by Allied Market Research on the "GaN Power Device Market" reveals that the market was valued at $305.0 million in 2023 and is projected to reach $12,849.3 million by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 45.6% from 2024 to 2033. The growth is attributed to the increasing demand for energy-efficient solutions in sectors like automotive, consumer electronics, and renewable energy. GaN power devices offer enhanced performance, efficiency, and faster switching speeds, making them popular for modern applications, including electric vehicles and sustainable energy systems. Moreover, advancements in GaN manufacturing processes, cost reductions, and government initiatives supporting green technologies are driving market expansion. The report encompasses 117 tables, 46 charts, and 300 pages, providing in-depth insights for industry stakeholders.

news.headline: Infinitum finalist for 'Coolest Thing Made in Austin' in ARMA Awards.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Infinitum has been recognized as a finalist in the prestigious Austin Regional Manufacturing Association (ARMA) Awards. The company is competing in the "Coolest Thing Made in Austin" category.

news.headline: XRP price up by 4% in 24 hours, currently priced at $2.69, with a 11.0% gain in the past week, hitting an all-time high of $3.40.
news.summary: In the last day, the price of XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has increased by 4.04% to reach $2.69, maintaining a positive trajectory from the previous week with an 11.0% rise from $2.43. XRP's all-time high is recorded at $3.40. This data showcases the recent performance and volatility of XRP in the market. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Accenture invests in Voltron Data to simplify large-scale data processing using GPU technology.
news.summary: Accenture has declared an investment in Voltron Data, a company based in Mountain View, California. The exact amount of the investment has not been disclosed as of now.

news.headline: Stingray Advertising is pioneering in-store audio ads in Canada, leveraging insights from a 2025 playbook.
news.summary: Unveiling the Impact of In-Store Audio: Key findings from Harmonizing Retail Media: The 2025 In-Store Audio Playbook, a comprehensive report shedding light on the potential of in-store audio for retail businesses. The playbook provides insights and strategies to leverage this powerful tool, predicting a significant increase in its utilization by 2025. This valuable resource underscores the importance of in-store audio, highlighting its capability to enhance customer experiences and boost sales. Businesses are advised to tap into this trend, with projected numbers indicating a substantial growth in the utilization of in-store audio in the upcoming years.

news.headline: Compound Planning integrates tax filing, providing clients options to manage taxes through dashboard or CPA assistance.
news.summary: A digital family office called Compound Planning based in New York is revolutionizing wealth management by offering integrated tax filing and planning services. Through their new tax filing options powered by april, clients can easily manage their taxes from the Compound dashboard. They have the choice of self-service, guided digital filing through april, or full-service filing with a trusted CPA partner. This streamlines the traditionally fragmented tax filing process, providing a seamless experience for clients.

news.headline: FHLB Cincinnati's 2024 results show $608M net income, $135.6B in assets, $7.8B mission assets, $45.1B investments; paid 9% dividend.
news.summary: The Federal Home Loan Bank of Cincinnati released unaudited financial results for 2024, showing a net income of $608 million with an ROE of 9.48%. The bank contributed $110 million towards affordable housing and community investment, with $68 million for the required Affordable Housing Program (AHP) and $42 million voluntarily. Total assets were $132.3 billion, up 7% from 2023, with Mission Assets at $135.6 billion. Investments totaled $45.1 billion, including $18.8 billion in mortgage-backed securities. GAAP capital was $6.7 billion, above regulatory requirements. The bank paid a dividend at a 9.00% rate. Various housing programs received funding, with the voluntary contributions including $15 million to the CMP Housing Fund, $16 million to the Welcome Home program, $6 million to Rise Up, and $1 million to the Disaster Reconstruction Program. An additional $4 million was committed to balance AHP contributions. Retained earnings were $1.8 billion.

news.headline: Shake Shack reports Q4 earnings: Sales surge by 15%, margins expand, plans 85 new locations by 2025.
news.summary: Shake Shack, Inc. (NYSE:SHAK) saw its shares rise as it reported adjusted fourth-quarter earnings of 26 cents per share, surpassing the expected 24 cents. The quarterly sales stood at $328.70 million, a 14.8% increase from the previous year and beat analysts' estimate of $327.87 million. System-wide sales grew by 13.3% to reach $500.7 million, while Same-Shack sales went up by 4.3%. Shack sales for the quarter amounted to $316.632 million, compared to $275.775 million in the previous year. The restaurant-level profit margin improved by 290 basis points to 22.7% of Shack sales.

news.headline: Knightscope Inc. (NASDAQ: KSCP) reported new sales in public safety, healthcare, education, and transit systems, with fleet upgrades.
news.summary: In Mountain View, California, Knightscope, Inc. (NASDAQ: KSCP), known for its advancements in robotics and AI for public safety, has revealed recent sales aimed at enhancing safety measures in communities, schools, and transportation networks. The company is also making strides in the healthcare sector and has reached a significant milestone in upgrading its fleet. Knightscope's partner, Structure, is involved in Emergency Communication Devices.

news.headline: Coupang recognized as one of the top 100 global innovators for 2025 by LexisNexis.
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the economy grew by 6.2% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations and marking a significant increase from the previous quarter's 4.8% growth. The growth was mainly driven by a surge in consumer spending, which rose by 8.5% during this period. Additionally, exports saw a boost of 7.3%, contributing to the overall positive performance of the economy. These figures indicate a strong economic recovery and have raised optimism for future growth prospects.

news.headline: Donorbox boosts $3B in donations for 100,000 nonprofits using AI, revamping fundraising.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia, Donorbox, a leader in the nonprofit donation sector, has facilitated more than $3 billion in donations for over 100,000 organizations. They have achieved this milestone by leveraging artificial intelligence tools and unique fundraising strategies, which have significantly boosted their growth trajectory.

news.headline: Movistar partners with Helium to launch Network for 2M subscribers in Mexico, expanding in 300 sites; had pilot in 2024.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Movistar, a mobile carrier under Telefónica in Mexico, has partnered with Helium, a leader in decentralized wireless communications, to launch the Helium Network. This collaboration will provide service to more than 2 million Movistar users in Mexico. The first stage of deployment will involve expanding the network across 300 sites. In 2024, Movistar and Helium conducted a trial involving actual Movistar clients to enhance the operator's coverage in the country.

news.headline: April Brady becomes CEO of Systrends, part of Bristlecone Companies in Tempe, Arizona, specializing in compliance software.
news.summary: A seasoned energy software executive has been appointed by Bristlecone Companies to lead Systrends, based in Tempe, Arizona. This move aims to strengthen the compliance sector of the company and enhance its performance in the energy industry. The appointment is expected to bring significant experience and expertise in the field to the team and drive growth.

news.headline: Veteran advisors launch XXI Wealth in partnership with Dynasty Financial, led by 4 professionals with 25+ years of experience.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, a group of seasoned advisors revealed the establishment of their independent company, XXI Wealth, in collaboration with Dynasty Financial Partners. Situated in Chicago, XXI Wealth is an independent wealth management firm offering top-tier service and exclusive investment options. The team comprises four experienced professionals averaging over 25 years in the investment sector: Kurt Newsom as the Managing Partner.

news.headline: eClinicalWorks and Sunoh.ai boost clinical efficiency at HealthWorks for Northern Virginia, reducing staff burnout.
news.summary: eClinicalWorks, a major ambulatory cloud EHR provider, revealed that HealthWorks for Northern Virginia has effectively implemented Sunoh.ai and eClinicalWorks AI-powered tools for enhancing clinical documentation and productivity. The innovative solutions, such as healow Chatbot, have been integrated to minimize staff burnout and enhance overall clinical efficiency. Sunoh.ai works in tandem with the eClinicalWorks EHR system to facilitate seamless documentation of patient interactions, offering an improved user experience.
